Folder.Name: Target Folder
Folder.Hint: Folder in the repository where actors will be stored for THIS world.

Token.Name: GitHub Personal Access Token
Token.Hint: Token with 'repo' scope to allow pushing/pulling data.

UI.Title: GitHub Actor Sync
UI.ConflictHint: Remote version differs from local. Keep remote?
UI.FolderNotFound: Warning: Target folder not found in the repository.

Notifications.NoFolder: You must configure a Target Folder in the module settings first.
Notifications.NoFolderConfigured: GitHub Sync: No target folder configured. Fill in 'Target Folder' in settings to enable synchronization.
Notifications.FolderMissingOnRemote: GitHub Sync: Folder '{folder}' does not exist on GitHub yet. It will be created on first push.

UpdateAvailable.Title: GitHub Updates Available
UpdateAvailable.Content: Found {count} update(s) or new actors on GitHub. Would you like to check them now?
